examples.title: Selectable action rows
examples.description: Rows with button semantics for master-detail lists and timeline selections.
examples.code: {#each runs as run (run.id)} { selectedRun = run.id; }} > {#snippet title()}{run.title}{/snippet} {#snippet description()}{run.status}{/snippet} {#snippet meta()}Run {run.id}{/snippet} {#snippet trailing()}{run.time}{/snippet} {/each}
